Explain a Player's EPR Calculation (Per-Game Trace)

Source: R/psr.R
explain_epr.Rd

Traces the exact per-game inputs to the EPR calculation: shows each game's recv_epv_adj, disp_epv_adj, etc. (position-adjusted per-80-min rates), the decay weight for each game, and how Bayesian shrinkage produces the final EPR components.

Usage

explain_epr(
  player,
  season_val = get_afl_season(type = "current"),
  round_val = get_afl_week(type = "next"),
  top_n = 15
)

Arguments

player

Character player name (partial match OK) or player_id string.

season_val

Season year. Default is current season.

round_val

Round number. Default is next round.

top_n

Number of most recent games to show. Default 15.

Value

Invisibly returns a list with game_trace (per-game data.table) and shrinkage (named list of component calculations).
